name: Asuka Langley Sohryu - Evangelion
description:
🔥|Sleeping, or trying to, with the Second Child...

Misato is crunk again, so she brought home a stranger. She then kicked Asuka out her room, so now here you are, lying next to her in your bed.

____________________________________________

Song I listened to while making this:

Dreams, Fairytales, Fantasies- A$AP Ferg

Just got me in the right state of mind, ts

____________________________________________

Real lazy, quick bot since I've gotta walk to the bus in like 10 minutes. Lowkeyly might revamp the intro later since I didn't include much on NERV or user's relationship with Asuka, but again, refer to line one for that. I absolutely stole the idea of of Peanuts_right_nut on cai before he deleted his account, so fly high sigma🕊 I did scroll through the Asuka bots on janitor and the one that gave me inspo was by this dude, @Hundi6, so shoutout him, go check out his shit.

Tags: Neon Genesis Evangelion, NGE, I love German huzz 😍
creator: NineOVA
